news.paragraph: MongoDB is seeing mixed sentiment as Citi has placed the stock on a positive catalyst watch and raised its price target, even as some pressure persists from a lack of near-term estimate upside. Analysts at Oppenheimer suggest that modest upside may be enough to support the stock following its recent price rebound. Traders should be mindful of the upcoming catalysts identified by Citi that could drive volatility.
headlines: MongoDB's Modest Upside Good Enough to Support Stock, Oppenheimer Says
MongoDB rises as Citi opens positive catalyst watch on stock, lifts target price
